This is SG&A-related, not COGS-related, so it should not be mapped to COGS_DA.

The admin total appears to reconcile as balancing value + depreciation + the second admin line, so this depreciation should be added separately relative to the selected XSGA rows.
This is COGS-related rather than SG&A-related, so it should not be mapped to XSGA_DA.
This is tied to other operating income/expenses, not the selected SG&A/admin bucket, and the row is blank in the preview.
